stemHtml: The commander of a jet transport aircraft, on an IFR flight with duration of 7 hours from take-off to landing, shall declare an emergency when the…

options.a: usable fuel on board is less than the required alternate fuel plus final reserve fuel.
options.b: calculated usable fuel on landing, at the nearest adequate aerodrome, is less than final reserve fuel.
options.c: calculated usable fuel at engine shutdown on the ramp of the nearest adequate aerodrome is less than final reserve fuel.
options.d: calculated usable fuel on landing is less than the minimum fuel defined by the aircraft manufacturer.
